hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '/(agents|runtime)/[^/]+\.ts$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "[CLAUDE.md] Modified agent or runtime file. Before marking done: confirm AGENTS.md and SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE.md reflect this change."}}'; fi
